_oz_notes.env_vars: Set GITHUB_TOKEN and LINEAR_API_KEY in your shell or add them to the Oz environment via 'oz secret create'. Oz injects them at runtime.
_oz_notes.cloud_env: For cloud runs, credentials must be stored as Oz environment secrets, NOT local env vars. Add them in the Oz web app or via: oz secret create --name GITHUB_TOKEN --value ghp_xxx
_oz_notes.repeatable: Pass --mcp multiple times for separate config files, or combine all servers into one JSON.
